message:
fix(tests): add missing assertions to RPC coverage and list filter tests

- TestSetTimeout: verify timeout is actually stored on client
- TestReady: unmarshal response data and verify limit is respected
- TestStats: unmarshal response data and verify counts are non-negative
- Label/title filter tests: verify returned issue identity, not just count

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
